description_long: This is a modern bungalow set within a lush, landscaped plot featuring a large, irregularly shaped blue pool at the front and side. The building is constructed primarily from light-colored blocks, with a flat, tan roof and large glass windows that provide ample natural light. The property is surrounded by a mix of deciduous trees and shrubs, with a brick perimeter wall enclosing the lot. A wooden walkway leads from the main entrance across the pool, connecting to a dock and a small garden area. The bungalow has multiple levels, with cantilevered sections extending over the water, and a spacious porch area at the front. The overall design emphasizes open space, integration with nature, and clean, geometric lines.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large glass windows, set beside a blue pool and surrounded by trees and gardens. The structure features cantilevered sections, a wooden walkway, and a spacious porch.
description_view_0: The front and left side of the bungalow are visible, showing the main entrance, wooden walkway, and the pool wrapping around the building with lush landscaping.
description_view_1: A direct front view highlights the main entrance, porch, and the symmetrical arrangement of the walkway and garden beds leading up to the house.
description_view_2: The rear and right side of the bungalow are shown, with the pool extending along the side and more trees densely packed at the back perimeter.
description_view_3: The back of the bungalow is visible, with the pool curving around and a dock extending into the water, surrounded by trees and greenery.
